title: Counters Directory Abstraction
description: The counters directory is responsible for managing the counters in a Hadoop MapReduce job. It provides a common interface for counter groups and allows for the addition, finding, and iteration over counters. The directory also handles the limits for the number of counters and counter groups in a job. The files in this directory collaborate by using the Counter interface and the Writable interface to read and write counter data to and from a stream. The architectural role of this directory is to provide a centralized location for managing counters and to ensure that the limits are enforced.
